_comment: Failure-class tags for every analyzed LongMemEval miss (validation 2026-07-09, docs/prd-longmemeval.md §Validation). The harness prints a per-class pass table for tagged questions, so each milestone proves it moved ITS class. Classes: aggregation (count/total/order needs ALL mentions), semantic-mismatch (zero token overlap), neighbor-chunk (answer sits in the adjacent chunk), false-premise (question assumes an event that never happened), second-event (one of two needed events missed by top-k), date-inference ('today' should date to the session date), variance (recovered on identical-input replay), judge-fn (judge false negative, answer was correct), wrong-instance (right topic, wrong mention).
